entries.title: RSAC 2026 Recap: From AI Hype to Real SaaS Security Outcomes
entries.summary: RSAC reinforced that AI is everywhere, but real value comes from applying it thoughtfully. Strong data, governed identities, and continuous SaaS monitoring matter more than speed or features. The post RSAC 2026 Recap: From AI Hype to Real SaaS Security Outcomes appeared first on AppOmni .

entries.title: To Scale AI Agents Successfully, Think of Them Like Team Members
entries.summary: In 2025, AppOmni demonstrated how insecure configurations in ServiceNow’s Now Assist environment could allow "second-order prompt injection." The post To Scale AI Agents Successfully, Think of Them Like Team Members appeared first on AppOmni .

entries.title: Salesforce guest flaws fuel large-scale data harvesting

entries.title: ShinyHunters Claims Woflow Breach in Supply Chain Hack
entries.summary: ShinyHunters claims a breach of SaaS provider Woflow in a supply-chain attack impacting major brands, highlighting escalating third-party SaaS security risks and the need for continuous monitoring.
